items.title: Cottesloe beachfront redevelopment to proceed after securing $15 million from federal and local governments
items.summary: An oceanfront redevelopment at Perth's iconic Cottesloe Beach will go ahead with $15 million in funding, but the mayor says more financial assistance is needed from the state government to complete the project.

items.title: North Queensland crowd raises record figure for Arrow and MND charity
items.summary: North Queensland climbs into the NRL's top six with an impressive 30-18 victory over South Sydney in Townsville, where fans raise thousands of dollars for the Fight MND charity.

items.title: Air and land search continues for missing 31-year-old man in Arnhem Land
items.summary: The NT Police Force says it continues to hold concerns for the welfare of the man, who was last seen early on Friday.

items.title: One dead, 21 feared trapped under rubble after Philippines building collapse
items.summary: Search and rescue operations are underway in the Philippines after a nine-storey building collapsed.

items.title: Man dies after shark attack in Far North Queensland
items.summary: A 39-year-old man has died following a shark attack in Far North Queensland.

items.title: Police say drink driver uninjured despite crashing into pole and over embankment at Aldinga
items.summary: SA Police say a woman has lost her licence after crashing into a timber pole and onto a beach in Adelaide while drink driving.

items.title: Police officer injured during stolen vehicle crash in Mackay
items.summary: The officer was taken to Mackay Hospital in a stable condition with lower leg injury.

items.title: Love story: Teddy needed love, and I knew I could give it to him
items.summary: Judith Geppert has an impressive resume of achievements and celebrations, but her capabilities are often questioned. Her dog Teddy, however, never treated her any differently.

items.title: Sexual Health Victoria to close Melbourne CBD facility despite concerning STI rates
items.summary: The service says government funding has failed to keep pace with increased demand and overhead costs, with rates of sexually transmitted diseases at near-record levels.

items.title: Independent senator David Pocock won't rule out starting party of independents in response to One Nation
items.summary: The independent senator says Australians are frustrated with a political system that "does not work for them".

items.title: WA State Library exhibition sheds fresh light on Albany's pre-colonial history
items.summary: Oral histories from Menang Noongar elders are combined with AI renderings of life before colonisation in an exhibition at the WA State Library.

items.title: King Valley prosecco producers prepare for upcoming export label change for Italian wine variety

items.title: Endangered Manning River turtle numbers holding steady, a year after record-breaking floods
items.summary: Experts are relieved to see the number of endangered Manning River turtles holding steady, a year after devastating flooding in northern New South Wales.

items.title: Early intervention program teaching kids how to navigate grief

items.summary: Queensland Police said the man approached officers and made threats towards them while armed with a firearm, and as a result was shot.

items.summary: The next opportunity to test support for One Nation in Western Sydney will be the state election on March 13. Already, disillusioned Labor voter Silvana Rota is ready to "give them a go".

items.title: Five Italian divers died in a Maldives cave system. Authorities still don't know why they went down there
items.summary: The question of why experienced divers would descend to depths of more than 50 metres on a single tank of air — let alone enter a cave while doing so — baffles members of the relatively close-knit deep-sea diving community.
